description_long: This cabinetry installation features a modern kitchen layout with a combination of base cabinets, tall pantry units, and an island. The cabinetry is finished in a light wood tone with clean, flat panel doors and integrated appliances, including an oven and a cooktop on the island. The sink is positioned beneath a large window, providing a functional workspace with ample natural light. Open shelving is visible on one side, offering display or storage space, while the rest of the cabinetry is closed for a streamlined appearance. The overall design is minimalist, with no visible handles, emphasizing a contemporary aesthetic. The cabinetry is built-in and floor-standing, suitable for a residential or communal kitchen in an urban environment.
description: A modern, light wood kitchen cabinetry set with base cabinets, a tall pantry, an island, and open shelving, featuring a minimalist, handleless design. Integrated appliances and a large window above the sink complete the contemporary look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the depth of the cabinetry and the tall pantry unit, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the kitchen island, base cabinets, integrated appliances, and the window above the sink.
description_view_2: Rear angled view revealing the open shelving and the cooktop on the island, as well as the spatial arrangement of the cabinetry.
description_view_3: Back view showing the solid wall with a window cutout, offering a glimpse of the kitchen workspace inside.
attribute_cabinet_type: base cabinet with island and tall pantry
attribute_door_configuration: combination of single door, double door, and open shelf
